title: 2 star-like UFOs caused power failure near a lagoon in Nísia Floresta [2009]

text_preview: JULY 19th, 2009. Time: 18h50. Duration: 90 minutes. In Lagoa de Carcará, City of Nísia Floresta, State of Rio Grande do Norte, a witness observed for 90 minutes two unidentified flying objects with blue and red color, and star-like appearance. The two objects were sighted East of Lagoa do Carcará and heading South. The UFOs moved at variable speeds in a zigzag motion and at high altitude. A power failure was reported by the witness as a parallel phenomenon caused by the UFOs during the sighting. The additional observations in the COMDABRA’s report [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] further
summary: On Jul 19, 2009 two star-like blue-red UFOs were observed zigzagging for 90 minutes near Lagoa do Carcará in Nísia Floresta, RN, coinciding with a local power failure.
